CommunityRegistration.title: CommunityRegistration
CommunityRegistration.description: User registration record for the Siam Cyber community

uid.description: The unique Firebase Auth identifier of the user

name.description: The display name of the registered user

email.description: The email address of the registered user

registeredAt.description: The timestamp indicating when they registered
